known_issues: Import to dashboard is failing with an error (reported by user)

existing_features.title: Investigate and fix the import failure in CSVImportSection where all parsed records fail to upsert to the backend. The error toast shows 'Failed to import unit "S10026_PRD" (2026-W09) from "S10026_PRD.xls"' followed by 'All 4 records failed to import'. The unit IDs are derived from filenames (e.g. S10026_PRD, S10006-PRD, S10002-PRD). Identify why the backend upsert calls are failing — likely causes include: (1) the unit ID or week key format not matching what the backend actor expects, (2) a type mismatch in the data being sent, or (3) an error thrown by the backend actor during the create/update call. Add detailed per-record error logging to the console and ensure the error toast message includes the specific backend error reason so users can diagnose the problem.
